name: Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.
description: Marsh McLennan is a global professional services firm that provides expertise across risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting. With over 90,000 colleagues operating in more than 130 countries, the company helps organizations navigate complex challenges and build strategies to thrive. By leveraging data, insights, and a wide range of professional capabilities, Marsh McLennan assists clients in industries such as financial services, healthcare, and technology to anticipate risks and unlock new opportunities. The firm is committed to delivering value to stakeholders through its integrated approach to risk management and strategic consulting.
